remarks: Unique mixed-use opportunity in the heart of Stamford! This versatile property features a residential home in the front, zoned RH, offering comfortable living with strong rental or owner-occupant potential. The rear of the property is commercially zoned and includes a grandfathered welding shop, making it ideal for contractors, tradespeople, or investors seeking an established workspace with flexibility for continued use. In addition, the property boasts four garages, providing ample storage, workspace, or additional income potential. Whether you're looking to live and run a business on-site, expand your investment portfolio, or take advantage of Stamford's growing market, this property offers endless possibilities. A rare find combining residential comfort with commercial functionality-don't miss this exceptional opportunity!
